title: Bridge Essay: Fear and decision-making in narcissistic personality disorder-a link between psy

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Wind and pride — ego, narcissism, social dominance, self-esteem, status, social hierarchy in neuroscience, self-enhancement, hubris.

**Fear and decision-making in narcissistic personality disorder-alink between psychoanalysis and neuroscience.** — Dialogues Clin Neurosci. PMID: 24174893. DOI: 10.31887/DCNS.2013.15.2/eronningstam. Linking psychoanalytic studies with neuroscience has proven increasingly productive for identifying and understanding personality functioning. This article focuses on pathological narcissism and narcissistic personality disorder (NPD), with the aim of exploring two clinically relevant aspects of narcissistic functioning also recognized in psychoanalysis: fear and decision-making.
